page.spell_fire_ring.desc: Creates a ring of fire around the caster.
page.spell_incinerate.desc: Creates a powerful jet of fire.
page.spell_zephyr.desc: Conjures a breeze that carries the caster.
page.spell_thunderstroke.desc: Calls down a barrage of lightning
page.spell_fang_mangle.desc: Calls forth fangs from the underworld
page.spell_summon_bee.desc: Summons bees to attack a target
page.spell_translocation.desc: Allows the caster to swap spots with a target
page.spell_rumor.desc: Corrupt a mind with a rumor
page.spell_counterspell.desc: Launches a golden bolt that turns a spell back on its caster
page.spell_gale.desc: Shoots a blast of air that knocks back enemies.
page.spell_winter_roar.desc: Shoots a blast of icy wind.
page.spell_pollen_cloud.desc: Conjures a disorienting cloud of pollen.
page.spell_thorn_ring.desc: Summons thorny vines from the earth.
page.spell_shulker_bullet.desc: Shoots a shulker bullet at a creature.
page.spell_raise_zombie.desc: Raises a Zombie from its grave.
page.spell_raise_skeleton.desc: Raises a Skeleton from its grave.
page.spell_spectral_hand.desc: Summons a ghostly hand to do your bidding.
page.spell_earthquake.desc: Shakes the earth with geomantic power.
page.spell_shadow_spy.desc: Turns a spider eye into a spy.
page.spell_meteor_strike.desc: Summons a meteor to strike a target.
page.spell_invisibility.desc: Allows the caster to become invisible.
page.spell_water_jet.desc: Shoots a blast of water that knocks back enemies.
page.spell_fiery_blessing.desc: Allows the caster to become immune to fire.
page.spell_tremor.desc: Emits a shockwave from the caster.
page.spell_grow_apple.desc: Grows an Apple when a leaves are broken.
page.spell_dry.desc: Dries the block the spell is cast on.

modifier.cost1.desc: Reduces a spell's mana cost by a little.
modifier.cost2.desc: Reduces a spell's mana cost by a bit.
modifier.cost3.desc: Reduces a spell's mana cost by a decent amount.
modifier.cost4.desc: Reduces a spell's mana cost by a lot.
modifier.cost5.desc: Reduces a spell's mana cost by a ton.
modifier.material_cost1.desc: Decreases the chance a spell will consume a material component by a little.
modifier.material_cost2.desc: Decreases the chance a spell will consume a material component by a bit.
modifier.material_cost3.desc: Decreases the chance a spell will consume a material component by a decent amount.
modifier.material_cost4.desc: Decreases the chance a spell will consume a material component by a lot.
modifier.material_cost5.desc: Decreases the chance a spell will consume a material component by a ton.
modifier.power1.desc: Increases the power of a spell by a little; the exact effects differ from spell to spell.
modifier.power2.desc: Increases the power of a spell by a bit; the exact effects differ from spell to spell.
modifier.power3.desc: Increases the power of a spell by a decent amount; the exact effects differ from spell to spell.
modifier.power4.desc: Increases the power of a spell by a lot; the exact effects differ from spell to spell.
modifier.power5.desc: Increases the power of a spell by a ton; the exact effects differ from spell to spell.
modifier.duration1.desc: Increases the duration of a spell by a little.
modifier.duration2.desc: Increases the duration of a spell by a bit.
modifier.duration3.desc: Increases the duration of a spell by a decent amount.
modifier.duration4.desc: Increases the duration of a spell by a lot.
modifier.duration5.desc: Increases the duration of a spell by a ton.
modifier.aoe1.desc: Increases the reach of a spell by a little.
modifier.aoe2.desc: Increases the reach of a spell by a bit.
modifier.aoe3.desc: Increases the reach of a spell by a decent amount.
modifier.aoe4.desc: Increases the reach of a spell by a lot.
modifier.aoe5.desc: Increases the reach of a spell by a ton.
modifier.strength1.desc: Increases the strength of a spell by a little.
modifier.strength2.desc: Increases the strength of a spell by a bit.
modifier.strength3.desc: Increases the strength of a spell by a decent amount.
modifier.strength4.desc: Increases the strength of a spell by a lot.
modifier.strength5.desc: Increases the strength of a spell by a ton.

effect.spell_charge: A swift surge of arcane current that floods the spell held ready upon your ring, restoring its spent charges in an instant. A stronger potion returns a further charge to the active tier.
effect.spell_charge_regen: A lingering undercurrent of aura that quickens the natural replenishment of your spell charges, much as mana regeneration hastens the return of mana. While it endures the charges of every tier rekindle far sooner, and stronger brews hasten their recovery further still.
